fakejavax.swing

Class JPanel

  • java.lang.Object
    • fakejavax.swing.JPanel

  • public class JPanel
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JPanel()
      Constructs a new JPanel to act as a container for various JComponents

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Adds the given JLabel to the JPanel

      Adds the given JTextField to the JPanel

      Sets the layout manager to be the given FlowLayout
